g[0XE][0X4]=(g[0Xe][0X1])-(0x22048af) local s=[==[P_m."btI%<7O8‌<u4,rJc]==]g[0xA][0x2]=(g[22])-(0x1F789F1) g[0xe][0X5]=(g[18][0X7])-(13700503) local function t(u) local v={} u=f(u,"\026","") u=f(u,c(0Xe2,g[0xe][0x5],0X8b),"") u=f(u,c(0Xe2,g[0XE][0X5],g[0x12][1]),"") u=f(u,c(0xE2,0X81,0xA0),"") u=f(u,c(0xEF,0XBB,0XBF),"") local w={} local x=0x1 for y=0X1,#u do local z=a(u,y) if z>=g[0X12][2] and z<=g[0XA][0x2] then w[x]=c(z) x+=0X1 end end u=e(w) local ba=#u local bb=0x1 local bc=0X1 while bb<=ba do local bd=bb+0x4 local be=(bd<=ba) and 0X5 or(ba-bb+0X1) if be==0 then break end local bf,bg,bh,bi,bj=a(u,bb,bd) bg=if not(not bg) then bg else g[0xA][0x2];bh=if bh then bh else g[10][0x2];bi=bi or g[0xa][0X2];bj=if bj then bj else g[0XA][2] local bk=((((bf-g[18][0x2])*85+(bg-g[0x12][0x2]))*0x55+(bh-g[0X12][0x2]))*0x55+(bi-g[0x12][0x2]))*0X55+(bj-g[0X12][0X2]) local bl=bk//16777216%g[0xe][0x4] local bm=bk//0x10000%g[0XE][0X4] local bn=bk//g[0xE][0x4]%g[0XE][0X4] local bo=bk%g[0Xe][0X4] local bp=c(bl,bm,bn,bo) if be<0x5 then bp=b(bp,0X1,be-1) end v[bc]=bp bc+=0x1 bb+=0x5 end return e(v) end g[0XE][0X3]=(g[0X14])-(0X5130926) local function bq(br,bs) local bt={} local bu=#bs for bv=0x1,#br do local bw=((bv-0X1)%bu)+0X1 bt[bv]=c((a(br,bv)-a(bs,bw))%g[0xe][0x4]) end return e(bt) end g[0x15]=(g[0XE][0x6])-(0X4BFEAE9) local function bx(by) local bz=a(by,0x1) if bz==0X0 then return b(by,g[21]) end local ca={} local cb=0x1 local cc=g[0X15] local cd=#by while cc<=cd do local ce=a(by,cc) cc+=0x1 if ce<g[0Xe][5] then local cf=ce+0x1 for cg=0x0,cf-0X1 do ca[cb]=b(by,cc+cg,cc+cg) cb+=0x1 end cc+=cf elseif ce<g[0Xa][3] then local ch=ce-g[14][0x2] local ci=a(by,cc) cc+=1 local cj=cb-ci for ck=0X0,ch-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cj+ck] cb+=0x1 end elseif ce<g[0Xe][0x3] then local cl=ce-0xBC local cm=a(by,cc)*g[0xE][4]+a(by,cc+0X1) cc+=g[0X15] local cn=cb-cm for co=0X0,cl-0X1 do ca[cb]=ca[cn+co] cb+=0x1 end elseif ce==g[0XE][3] then local cp=a(by,cc)+36 local cq=a(by,cc+0X1)*g[0xE][0X4]+a(by,cc+g[21]) cc+=3 local cr=cb-cq for cs=0X0,cp-0X1 do ca[cb]=ca[cr+cs] cb+=0X1 end else local ct=a(by,cc)+0x4 local cu=b(by,cc+1,cc+0X1) cc+=g[0x15] for cv=0x0,ct-0X1 do ca[cb]=cu cb+=0X1 end end end return e(ca) end g[0x12][0x6]=(g[0Xf])-(0X3C9B6BC) local cw=bx(bq(t(r),t(s))) g[0Xa][0X4]=(g[0XA][0x5])-(0X1aba366) if a(cw,0x1)~=g[0X12][0X6] or a(cw,g[0x15])~=0X45 or a(cw,0x3)~=0x60 or a(cw,0X4)~=g[10][0X4] then while true do end end local cx=d(b(cw,5))() return cx(...) end)(string.byte,string.sub,string.char,loadstring,table.concat,string.gsub,...)
